scripts.cdk:synth: npm run build -w services/api && npm run build -w infra/cdk && npm run cdk -w infra/cdk -- synth MapVibe-dev-MediaWaf MapVibe-dev --context stage=dev
scripts.cdk:diff: npm run build -w services/api && npm run build -w infra/cdk && npm run cdk -w infra/cdk -- diff MapVibe-dev-MediaWaf MapVibe-dev --context stage=dev
scripts.cdk:deploy:dev: npm run build -w services/api && npm run build -w infra/cdk && npm run cdk -w infra/cdk -- deploy MapVibe-dev-MediaWaf MapVibe-dev --context stage=dev
scripts.cdk:diff:prod: npm run build -w services/api && npm run build -w infra/cdk && npm run cdk -w infra/cdk -- diff MapVibe-prod-MediaWaf MapVibe-prod --context stage=prod
